message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.fromstring passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-3vkj)

Expose fnp_python.fromstring delegating to
numpy.fromstring(string, dtype=float, count=-1, *, sep='', like=None).
Parity oracle test covers:
- whitespace sep=' ' numeric text
- explicit comma separator with embedded whitespace
- explicit int32 dtype override
- count-limited reads
- bytes input surface parity (success-or-error agreement)
- malformed-token ValueError surface parity
